Preconditions: NVIDIA driver or PCIe tools available
Pass Criteria: Expected GPUs are visible with expected count
GPU devices are visible on PCIe bus
Topology is captured or limitation documented
OS and kernel match expected validation baseline
Firmware versions are recorded and reviewed
Driver loads and reports GPU status
CUDA runtime is available or documented as not installed
PyTorch reports GPU access where PyTorch is in scope
TensorFlow reports GPU access where TensorFlow is in scope
Docker or container runtime is installed where container validation is in scope
GPU containers can access NVIDIA runtime where in scope
Sufficient storage is available for benchmark outputs
Expected network interfaces and link state are present
NCCL/fabric components align with platform scope
Notes: Only required for supported multi-GPU/fabric platforms
